title: bruh
description: well its a pack that has a lot of mods in it
body:
## **this is a still in making modpack**
this is a client side modpack to the core, so by installing this pack you can connect to vanilla server and have the benefit of modded minecraft as much as possibale

<details>
<summary>description</summary>
Bruh is a modpack that makes Minecraft run smoother and makes it look better. It's like a turbocharger for your game!
  
Multiplayer compatibility: this modpack is compatibal with vanilla server.
Better looks: Make your game look amazing.


A heads up:

BRUH is still being developed, so there might be some bugs.


Before you start:


Backup your world: Just in case the pack is still in the making.
Enjoy your boosted Minecraft experience!
</details>
